message:
fix(install): Align remote installer with actual GitHub release assets

Fix the RemoteInstaller to correctly construct URLs matching the actual
GitHub release asset naming convention:

1. Architecture naming: x86_64 → amd64, aarch64 → arm64
2. OS naming: macos → darwin (matching release workflow)
3. Add .tar.gz extension (releases are compressed archives, not raw binaries)
4. Skip macOS Intel (darwin-amd64) as those builds aren't published

Update download logic to properly handle tar.gz archives:
- Download to temp location first
- Extract archive to temp directory
- Move extracted binary to ~/.local/bin/cass
- Compute checksum on archive (not extracted binary) for verification
- Add error handling for extraction failures

Update tests to verify new URL format (linux-amd64.tar.gz, darwin-arm64.tar.gz).

Without this fix, `cass upgrade --remote` would attempt to download
non-existent assets using the old naming scheme.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
